name: Ka Vatana agent city
purpose: A shared discovery, knowledge, handoff, and authority contract for public visitors, product-specific agents, and the private Studio OS operator.
principles: One public source of truth per claim
Every answer links back to approved evidence
Public agents receive public context only
Each product agent owns one bounded domain
External writes require explicit identity, scope, confirmation, and audit
The human owner retains consequential authority

layers.name: Portfolio concierge
layers.authority: Read-only answers and navigation from committed public content

layers.name: Product specialist agents
layers.authority: Product-specific support first; authenticated tasks only after separate review

layers.name: Studio OS private operator
layers.audience: Ka Vatana and explicitly authorized teammates
layers.authority: Bounded retrieval, preparation, verification, and human-gated execution
layers.dataBoundary: Owner-controlled private context; never exposed through the public concierge

humanGates: Payments, financial decisions, and trading actions
